subject: BB workflow with post instantiation is not working
commit_message:
BB workflow with post instantiation is not working

The new BB AbstractCDSProcessingBB was not using the
InjectExecution.execute causing which seemed to be
de-serialization issue.

Issue-ID: SO-2797
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Premont-Tendland <sebastien.premont@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I323deee87d9cfd58d34a6edeca84843b7c87d0bf

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 4 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This will need to be cherry-picked to frankfurt branch.
